name: Come-And-Get-it Sauce for Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Heat gently until warmed through, ensuring it does not boil.
3. Spoon over vegetables when serving or use as a casserole topping for vegetables sprinkled with bread crumbs.
4. Place under the broiler for 1 to 2 minutes, or until breadcrumbs are lightly browned.
This recipe is ideal for fresh vegetables such as asparagus, broccoli, cabbage, cauliflower, green beans, and more.
